description_long: This object is a medium-sized pumpkin with a smooth, rounded body and a prominent, twisted stem at the top. The pumpkin's surface is a warm orange color, with subtle vertical ridges running from the stem to the base. The front features a carved face with two large, oval eyes and a wide, open mouth, giving it a playful and expressive appearance. The interior is hollow, as indicated by the cutouts for the eyes and mouth, and the walls appear moderately thick. The stem is grayish-brown and textured, adding a naturalistic touch to the overall look. There are no additional decorations or accessories visible on the pumpkin.
description: A medium orange pumpkin with a twisted stem and a carved face featuring large eyes and a wide mouth. The surface is smooth with subtle ridges and the interior is hollow.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved face with two large oval eyes and a wide open mouth, as well as the twisted stem.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the eye cutout and the full height of the stem, with the body curving smoothly backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uncarved, smooth surface of the pumpkin and the stem, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other eye cutout and the rounded body, with the stem visible at the top.
attribute_carving_pattern: The pumpkin features a traditional carving pattern with two large, oval eyes and a wide, open mouth. The style is simple and expressive, resembling a cartoonish or playful face. There are no additional motifs, etchings, or surface designs beyond the facial cutouts.
